subcodes.first_line: O Majíd! This day is thy day. Stand thou firm in the Cause, then aid thy Lord through whatsoever thou art able [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مجید الیوم یومک ان اثبت علی الامر ثم انصر ربک بما کنت مستطیعا علیه
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
